plan_under_test: Infer source companion keys from canonical paper IDs in output-integrity audits when source PDF metadata is absent.
tests_added_or_changed: Added test_current_output_integrity_infers_missing_mark_scheme_group_companion_from_paper_id. The fixture creates a missing mark-scheme record with paper=42summer19 and no source_pdf metadata, then expects source_companion=9709_2019_June_42 in unexpected_missing_mark_scheme_groups.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the group source_companion should be missing rather than 9709_2019_June_42.
what_passing_proves: Output-integrity audits can infer companion identity from canonical paper IDs when source PDF fields are absent.
Missing mark-scheme groups become actionable for records that lack source metadata.
Existing PDF-derived source companion behavior remains covered by prior tests.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove the inferred companion PDF exists.
It does not mark any missing mark schemes as allowed.
It does not repair output records or images.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The test uses one record, one parseable paper ID, and asserts the exact group produced by the public audit function.
